pre_game.message: Hey there, I'm A. It’s a bit nerve-wracking waiting for this to start, isn't it? What's your name, and what are you hoping to do if you win?
Hey A, I'm I. Yeah, the wait is definitely getting to me. If I win, I'm mostly looking to help out my family and get some things sorted for us. How about you?
I’m in the same boat. I’ve got some people close to me that I really want to look after, so winning this would mean everything for us.
I totally get that. It definitely adds a lot of pressure when it’s not just about you, but it makes you more determined, right?
For sure. Knowing they're counting on me makes me want to fight even harder for that prize. Are you feeling ready for whatever the game throws at us?
I’m as ready as I’ll ever be; just trying to stay focused on why I’m here. How about you, feeling confident?
I'm trying to be. Knowing what’s at stake keeps me focused, even if the nerves are still there.
I hear you. Having that 'why' is usually what keeps people going when things get tough.
Exactly. It makes all the stress and pressure feel worth it in the end.
Well said. Let's hope we both walk away with something for our families. Good luck out there, A.
Thanks, I. I really hope so too. Good luck to you as well.

post_game.message: Excellent job taking exactly the fair share. I chose to take $10,000 as well, and I'm glad we were all on the same page.
I agree. It was the most equitable outcome for everyone involved, and I'm glad we reached the same conclusion.
